items.name: Pocky From Japan: White Peach And Strawberry
items.merchantDescription: Glico Pocky is a Japanese staple chocolate biscuit snack. These Pocky sticks are an exclusive Japanese flavor featuring a blend of white peach and strawberry.

items.name: Pocky From Japan: Kuromitsu And Kinako
items.merchantDescription: Pocky is a staple chocolate biscuit snack, and here we have an exclusive Japanese flavor featuring the blend of kuromitsu (sugar syrup) and kinako (roasted soybean powder).

items.name: Coca-Cola Apple Coke
items.merchantDescription: Coca-Cola periodically releases Japan-exclusive flavors throughout the year. This Apple Coke is selling out everywhere and is limited time only. Enjoy the crisp taste of Apple in classic Coke while supplies last! Volume: 500mL

items.name: Tapioca Fruits Au Lait Candy
items.merchantDescription: Tapioca milk tea is bigger than ever in Japan and you know what that means - endless new flavors to try. These mango and strawberry au lait flavored hard candies pack a sweet punch with chewy tapioca gummy inside.

items.name: Hi-Chew Double Grape Flavor
items.merchantDescription: These double grape Hi-Chews perfectly balance two of Japan's most popular grape variaties. Purple Kyoho on the outside, with green Muscat on the inside.

items.name: Bull-Dog Chuno Tonkatsu Sauce (To-Go Size)
items.merchantDescription: Bull-Dog is one of the most famous sauce manufacturers in Japan. This tonkatsu sauce contains healthy extracts from fruits and vegetables for a strong and rich flavor. It goes well with croquettes, okonomiyaki and other Japanese fried/comfort foods. This conve

items.name: Morinaga Sweet Potato Flavor Caramels
items.merchantDescription: Fall in Japan means everything is sweet potato flavored! These chewy caramels are sligthly sweet and have all the autumn vibes.

items.name: Soymilk Hojicha Latte Tea Powder
items.merchantDescription: This soymilk hojicha tea powder can be enjoyed hot or cold and one cup contains about half of your daily calcium requirements. Mix 13g of powder with 120ml water and adjust to taste. Contains 91 grams, about enough for 7 cups of tea.

items.name: Asahi Wonda White Latte
items.merchantDescription: This white café latte has a pleasant, light, milky flavor. Can be enjoyed hot or cold. 480ml per bottle.

items.name: Ufo Thick And Rich Wasabi Yakisoba
items.merchantDescription: UFO is one of the staple instant yakisoba makers known for their unique flavors. Here we have a variety with rich wasabi seasoning!

items.name: Nissin Cup Noodles: Fukahire Soup Flavor
items.merchantDescription: Nissin is one of the popular instant ramen makers of Japan, and here we have a flavor inspired by the Chinese delicacy fukahire. Comes with a pack of oyster sauce to season your noodles after it finishes cooking.

items.name: Nittoh Royal Milk Tea Peach
items.merchantDescription: Create peach flavored milk tea in the comfort of your own home! Just pour 1 stick into a cup of hot water, but you can also enjoy iced. Includes 10 sticks.

items.name: Black Thunder: Morning Choco And Coffee
